text:
On Wed, 21 May 2008, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of databases/db41,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/123879 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Please close this one - the problem report pertains to 8-CURRENT which
I'm not going to support.

-- 
Matthias Andree
